logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : START
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "START", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), transmissionId: vars.integration.transmissionId default "", correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "P21" }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : invalid PurchaseOrder
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { message : "The incoming Purchase Order already exists in the system for the given customer. Stopping process.", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), transmissionId: vars.integration.transmissionId default "", correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "P21" }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : Valid PurchaseOrder
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { message : "Purchase Order validation successful. No duplicates found. Proceeding to price and item validation.", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), transmissionId: vars.integration.transmissionId default "", correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "P21" }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : PurchaseOrder Price Validation
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), transmissionId: vars.integration.transmissionId default "", correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "P21", overallStatus: vars.isValid.validationSummary.overallStatus default null, totalLines: vars.isValid.validationSummary.totalLines default null, failedLines: vars.isValid.validationSummary.failedLines default null, successfulLines: vars.isValid.validationSummary.successfulLines default null, }]

ee:transform.doc:name: Preparing Email Template, var : subject, vendorName

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : Price Match Sccucess
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "PRICE_MATCH_SUCCESS", message : "All PO lines matched P21 pricing and items successfully. No CSR review required.", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), transmissionId: vars.integration.transmissionId default "", correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "P21" }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : END
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "END", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), transmissionId: vars.integration.transmissionId default "", correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "P21" }]
